name: FIRST CAPITAL INC
summary: First Capital, Inc. is an Indiana-based bank holding company and parent of First Harrison Bank, an Indiana chartered commercial bank. The Bank operates in Harrison, Floyd, Clark, and Washington counties in Indiana and Bullitt County in Kentucky. It offers residential mortgage loans (1-4 family, multifamily), commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, consumer loans, home equity loans, and residential construction loans. The Bank sells qualified fixed-rate residential mortgages in the secondary market while retaining variable-rate and other loans in its portfolio.
